task: Advanced high-value task: Safety Plc Truth-Table Row Instrumentation Gap Memo. Scenario: an expert team is preparing a launch or release decision and needs a calculation-backed recommendation for safety plc truth-table row. Embedded packet: Records: R1 guard_closed=55 estop_ok=84 curtain_clear=8; R2 guard_closed=64 estop_ok=80 curtain_clear=11; R3 guard_closed=50 estop_ok=95 curtain_clear=7. Remediation options: O1 changes guard_closed by -12% cost=84500; O2 changes estop_ok by -18% cost=100500; O3 changes curtain_clear by -25% cost=59500; max_budget=126000. Rules and constraints: run permission requires all three true; mismatch is safety critical; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: calculate all derived metrics, classify each record, and explain the smallest set of values that determines the recommendation. Deliver safety_PLC_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
